chapter_title.en: Amīr al-mu’minīn rebukes the crowd for appearing only in disgraceful situations

parts.text: ٢٠٠. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام) وقد أُتي بِجَانٍ وَمَعَهُ غَوْغَاءُ: فَقَالَ

text: : لَا مَرْحَباً بِوُجُوهٍ لَا تُرَى إِلَّا عِنْدَ كُلِّ سَوْأَةٍ .

en.sayed-ali-raza: 200. An offender was brought before Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, and there was a crowd of people with the man, so Amīr al-mu’minīn remarked: Woe to the faces who are seen only on foul occasions.
